top_candidates.reasoning: The four-link 'see / describe / hear / know' chain with the explicit gap between the third and fourth link ('even after hearing, the new hire does not yet know it. Knowing is the third year on the rotation') is the unmistakable structural signature of āścaryavat paśyati / vadati / śṛṇoti / veda na caiva kaścit.
Knowledge-transmission theme is also present in 4.34 (approach the teacher, ask, render service) but 4.34 is prescriptive while 2.29 is descriptive of the gap.
Field-knower theme present in some commentaries but not the four-link chain.
